title: Skill Junction Unification — Single Source of Truth
summary: Established lazy vault as single source of truth for all 56 OpenCode skills + 7 built-in Codex skills. Bridged 6 always-on skills into vault via junctions, deduplicated pptx-to-pdf-converter, preserved and moved 7 built-in Codex skills into vault, replaced individual junctions with parent-level junctions in Codex and .agents. Plugin configured with single basePath.
keyOutcomes: All 63 skills discoverable via Codex and .agents through parent junctions
6 always-on skills bridged into vault via junctions (originals preserved in skill/)
pptx-to-pdf-converter deduplicated (vault copy replaced with junction)
7 built-in Codex skills preserved and moved into vault
Plugin config valid with single basePath pointing to complete vault
risks: Name collision if always-on skills already exist in vault (mitigated by Phase 0 pre-check)
Directory locked by running Codex process during junction replacement (mitigated by close-first instruction)
Plugin basePaths change causes duplicate skill entries (mitigated by rollback procedure)
deliverables: 6 always-on skills bridged into vault via junctions
pptx-to-pdf-converter deduplicated (vault copy replaced with junction)
skill-discovery bridged into vault via junction
7 built-in Codex skills preserved and moved into vault
Codex parent junction to vault (63 skills visible)
.agents parent junction to vault (63 skills visible)
Plugin config valid with single basePath
validationCriteria: Codex sees 63 skills through single parent junction
.agents sees 63 skills through single parent junction
Zero broken junctions in Codex or .agents (excluding 7 built-in Codex skills without SKILL.md)
Always-on skills still physically in ~/.config/opencode/skill/ (6 skills)
Vault has 63 entries (56 OpenCode + 7 built-in Codex)
Plugin config has 1 basePath pointing to the complete lazy vault and valid JSON
